title: Service Item
description: A service entry in the station's service catalog with pricing information

priceCreditsPerMinute.description: Price in credits per minute (applicable when pricingType is PerMinute)

priceCreditsFixed.description: Fixed price in credits (applicable when pricingType is fixed)

priceLocalPerMinute.description: Optional price in local-currency minor units per minute

priceLocalFixed.description: Optional fixed price in local-currency minor units

available.description: Whether this service is currently available for use
